  , lP = (e, t) => {
    const {parseClassName: n, getClassGroupId: r, getConflictingClassGroupIds: s} = t
      , o = []
      , i = e.trim().split(iP);
    let l = "";

          , {modifiers: h, hasImportantModifier: f, baseClassName: m, maybePostfixModifierPosition: x} = n(u);

                continue

            if (g = r(m),

function cP() {
    let e = 0, t, n, r = "";

        (t = arguments[e++]) && (n = n1(t)) && (r && (r += " "),
        r += n);
    return r

const n1 = e => {
    if (typeof e == "string")
        return e;
    let t, n = "";

        n += t);
    return n
}

function uP(e, ...t) {

    function i(c) {
        const u = t.reduce( (h, f) => f(h), e());
        return n = oP(u),

        o = l,
        l(c)
    }
    function l(c) {
        const u = r(c);
        if (u)
            return u;
        const h = lP(c, n);
        return s(c, h),
        h
    }
    return function() {
        return o(cP.apply(null, arguments))
    }
}

const IP = ["top", "right", "bottom", "left"]
  , js = Math.min
  , un = Math.max

  , Ul = Math.floor

    left: "right",
    right: "left",
    bottom: "top",

  , FP = {
    start: "end",
    end: "start"

function Hh(e, t, n) {
    return un(e, js(t, n))
}
function Or(e, t) {
    return typeof e == "function" ? e(t) : e
}
function Mr(e) {
    return e.split("-")[0]
}
function $o(e) {
    return e.split("-")[1]
}
function Ip(e) {
    return e === "x" ? "y" : "x"
}
function Dp(e) {
    return e === "y" ? "height" : "width"
}
function ks(e) {
    return ["top", "bottom"].includes(Mr(e)) ? "y" : "x"
}
function Fp(e) {
    return Ip(ks(e))
}
function LP(e, t, n) {
    n === void 0 && (n = !1);
    const r = $o(e)
      , s = Fp(e)
      , o = Dp(s);
    let i = s === "x" ? r === (n ? "end" : "start") ? "right" : "left" : r === "start" ? "bottom" : "top";
    return t.reference[o] > t.floating[o] && (i = Hc(i)),
    [i, Hc(i)]
}
function zP(e) {
    const t = Hc(e);
    return [Qh(e), t, Qh(t)]
}
function Qh(e) {
    return e.replace(/start|end/g, t => FP[t])
}
function VP(e, t, n) {
    const r = ["left", "right"]
      , s = ["right", "left"]
      , o = ["top", "bottom"]
      , i = ["bottom", "top"];
    switch (e) {
    case "top":
    case "bottom":
        return n ? t ? s : r : t ? r : s;
    case "left":
    case "right":
        return t ? o : i;
    default:
        return []
    }
}
function $P(e, t, n, r) {
    const s = $o(e);
    let o = VP(Mr(e), n === "start", r);
    return s && (o = o.map(i => i + "-" + s),
    t && (o = o.concat(o.map(Qh)))),
    o
}
function Hc(e) {
    return e.replace(/left|right|bottom|top/g, t => DP[t])
}
function BP(e) {
    return {
        top: 0,
        right: 0,
        bottom: 0,
        left: 0,
        ...e
    }
}
function d1(e) {
    return typeof e != "number" ? BP(e) : {
        top: e,
        right: e,
        bottom: e,
        left: e
    }
}
function Qc(e) {
    const {x: t, y: n, width: r, height: s} = e;
    return {
        width: r,
        height: s,
        top: n,
        left: t,
        right: t + r,
        bottom: n + s,
        x: t,
        y: n
    }
}
function o0(e, t, n) {
    let {reference: r, floating: s} = e;
    const o = ks(t)
      , i = Fp(t)
      , l = Dp(i)
      , c = Mr(t)
      , u = o === "y"
      , h = r.x + r.width / 2 - s.width / 2
      , f = r.y + r.height / 2 - s.height / 2
      , m = r[l] / 2 - s[l] / 2;
    let x;
    switch (c) {
    case "top":
        x = {
            x: h,
            y: r.y - s.height
        };
        break;
    case "bottom":
        x = {
            x: h,
            y: r.y + r.height
        };
        break;
    case "right":
        x = {
            x: r.x + r.width,
            y: f
        };
        break;
    case "left":
        x = {
            x: r.x - s.width,
            y: f
        };
        break;
    default:
        x = {
            x: r.x,
            y: r.y
        }
    }
    switch ($o(t)) {
    case "start":
        x[i] -= m * (n && u ? -1 : 1);
        break;
    case "end":
        x[i] += m * (n && u ? -1 : 1);
        break
    }
    return x
}

const rd = "/assets/hostezee_logo_transparent_1773119386285-DVnCrHM9.png";
async function EA() {
    try {
        const e = new AbortController
          , t = setTimeout( () => e.abort(), 2e3)
          , n = await fetch("/api/auth/user", {
            credentials: "include",
            signal: e.signal
        });
        if (clearTimeout(t),
        n.status === 401)
            return {
                user: null
            };
        if (n.status === 403) {
            const s = await n.json();
            return {
                user: null,
                verificationStatus: s.verificationStatus,
                isDeactivated: s.isDeactivated,
                message: s.message,
                pendingUser: s.user
            }
        }
        return n.ok ? {
            user: await n.json(),
            verificationStatus: "verified"
        } : {
            user: null
        }
    } catch {
        return console.log("[Auth] Check failed, treating as unauthenticated"),
        {
            user: null
        }
    }
}
function sd() {
    var n;
    const {data: e, isLoading: t} = Wt({
        queryKey: ["/api/auth/user"],
        queryFn: EA,
        retry: !1,
        staleTime: 1 / 0
    });
    return {
        user: (e == null ? void 0 : e.user) || void 0,
        isLoading: t,
        isAuthenticated: !!(e != null && e.user),
        verificationStatus: e == null ? void 0 : e.verificationStatus,
        isDeactivated: e == null ? void 0 : e.isDeactivated,
        pendingUser: e == null ? void 0 : e.pendingUser,
        message: e == null ? void 0 : e.message,
        isViewingAsUser: ((n = e == null ? void 0 : e.user) == null ? void 0 : n.isViewingAsUser) || !1
    }
}

    bookings: "none",

    rooms: "none",

    menuManagement: "none",

function Zp() {
    const {user: e, isAuthenticated: t} = sd()
      , {data: n, isLoading: r} = Wt({
        queryKey: ["/api/user-permissions"],
        enabled: t && !!(e != null && e.id) && (e == null ? void 0 : e.role) !== "super-admin"
    });
    if ((e == null ? void 0 : e.role) === "super-admin")
        return {
            permissions: S0(e.id),
            isLoading: !1,
            isFullAccess: !0,
            hasAccess: f => !0,
            canEdit: f => !0,
            canView: f => !0
        };
    const s = n ? PA.some(h => n[h] !== "none") : !1;
    if ((e == null ? void 0 : e.role) === "admin" && !s)
        return {
            permissions: S0((e == null ? void 0 : e.id) || ""),
            isLoading: r,
            isFullAccess: !0,
            hasAccess: f => !0,
            canEdit: f => !0,
            canView: f => !0
        };
    const o = (e == null ? void 0 : e.role) === "manager" ? {
        menuManagement: "edit"
    } : {}
      , i = {
        ...n || {
            userId: (e == null ? void 0 : e.id) || "",
            ...TA
        },
        ...o
    };
    return {
        permissions: i,
        isLoading: r,
        isFullAccess: !1,
        hasAccess: h => i[h] !== "none",
        canEdit: h => i[h] === "edit",
        canView: h => i[h] === "view" || i[h] === "edit"
    }
}

function XA({children: e, defaultTheme: t="light"}) {

                        y.reverse();

var BR = {
    ArrowLeft: "prev",
    ArrowUp: "prev",
    ArrowRight: "next",
    ArrowDown: "next",
    PageUp: "first",
    Home: "first",
    PageDown: "last",
    End: "last"
};
function UR(e, t) {
    return t !== "rtl" ? e : e === "ArrowLeft" ? "ArrowRight" : e === "ArrowRight" ? "ArrowLeft" : e
}
function WR(e, t, n) {
    const r = UR(e.key, n);

}

            preventScroll: t

        document.activeElement !== n))
            return
}

async function XR(e) {
    return e.length <= R0 ? e : new Promise(t => {
        const n = new Image;
        n.crossOrigin = "anonymous",
        n.onload = () => {
            const s = n.width > 800 ? 800 / n.width : 1
              , o = Math.round(n.width * s)
              , i = Math.round(n.height * s)
              , l = document.createElement("canvas");
            l.width = o,
            l.height = i;
            const c = l.getContext("2d");
            if (!c) {
                t(e);
                return
            }
            c.drawImage(n, 0, 0, o, i);
            try {
                const u = l.toDataURL("image/jpeg", .75);
                t(u.length <= R0 ? u : e)
            } catch {
                t(e)
            }
        }
        ,
        n.onerror = () => t(e),
        n.src = e
    }
    )
}

function eO() {
    try {
        const e = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext);
        [0, .45, .9].forEach(t => {
            const n = e.createOscillator()
              , r = e.createGain();
            n.connect(r),
            r.connect(e.destination),
            n.frequency.value = 880,
            n.type = "sine",
            r.gain.setValueAtTime(.6, e.currentTime + t),
            r.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(.001, e.currentTime + t + .35),
            n.start(e.currentTime + t),
            n.stop(e.currentTime + t + .35)
        }
        )
    } catch {}
}
function tO(e) {
    switch (console.log("[EventHandler] Received event:", e.type, e),
    e.type) {
    case "connected":
        console.log("[EventHandler] Connected to event stream");
        break;
    case "booking.created":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            predicate: t => {
                const n = t.queryKey[0];
                return n === "/api/bookings" || n === "/api/bookings/active" || n === "/api/rooms" || n === "/api/dashboard/stats" || n === "/api/analytics"
            }
        }),
        Na({
            title: "New Booking Created",
            description: `Booking ID: ${e.data.id}`
        });
        break;
    case "booking.updated":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/rooms"]
        });
        break;
    case "booking.cancelled":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/rooms"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/analytics"]
        }),
        Na({
            title: "Booking Cancelled",
            description: `Booking ID: ${e.data.id}`
        });
        break;
    case "booking.checked_in":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/rooms"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bills"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        });
        break;
    case "booking.checked_out":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/rooms"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bills"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/financials"]
        });
        break;
    case "payment.received":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bills"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/financials"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        }),
        Na({
            title: "Payment Received",
            description: `Amount: ₹${e.data.amount}`
        });
        break;
    case "order.placed":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/orders"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        }),
        eO(),
        Na({
            title: "🍽️ New Food Order!",
            description: e.data.roomNumber ? `Room ${e.data.roomNumber} — ₹${e.data.totalAmount}` : `Walk-in / Café — ₹${e.data.totalAmount}`,
            duration: 8e3
        });
        break;
    case "order.updated":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/orders"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        });
        break;
    case "room.status_changed":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/rooms"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        });
        break;
    case "enquiry.created":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/enquiries"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        });
        break;
    case "enquiry.confirmed":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/enquiries"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/rooms"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/analytics"]
        }),
        Na({
            title: "Enquiry Confirmed",
            description: "Converted to booking"
        });
        break;
    case "expense.added":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/expenses"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/financials"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/dashboard/stats"]
        });
        break;
    case "bill.generated":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bills"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings/active"]
        });
        break;
    case "bill.paid":
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bills"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/financials"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/bookings"]
        }),
        je.invalidateQueries({
            queryKey: ["/api/analytics"]
        });
        break;
    default:
        console.log("[EventHandler] Unhandled event type:", e.type)
    }
}
function nO() {
    try {
        const e = new EventSource("/api/events/stream");
        return e.onopen = () => {
            console.log("[EventSource] Connected to event stream")
        }
        ,
        e.onmessage = t => {
            try {
                const n = JSON.parse(t.data);
                tO(n)
            } catch (n) {
                console.error("[EventSource] Failed to parse event:", n)
            }
        }
        ,
        e.onerror = t => {
            console.error("[EventSource] Error:", t),
            e.readyState === EventSource.CLOSED && console.log("[EventSource] Connection closed, will reconnect...")
        }
        ,
        e
    } catch (e) {
        return console.error("[EventSource] Failed to connect:", e),
        null
    }
}
function rO(e) {
    const t = "=".repeat((4 - e.length % 4) % 4)
      , n = (e + t).replace(/-/g, "+").replace(/_/g, "/")
      , r = atob(n);
    return Uint8Array.from([...r].map(s => s.charCodeAt(0)))
}
function sO(e) {
    const {toast: t} = Bn()
      , [n,r] = d.useState("loading")
      , s = d.useRef(null)
      , o = d.useRef(null)
      , i = "serviceWorker"in navigator && "PushManager"in window;
    d.useEffect( () => {
        if (!e || !i) {
            r(i ? "unsubscribed" : "unsupported");
            return
        }
        let h = !1;
        return (async () => {
            try {
                const f = await navigator.serviceWorker.register("/sw.js", {
                    scope: "/"
                });
                await navigator.serviceWorker.ready,
                s.current = f;
                const m = await f.pushManager.getSubscription();
                if (h)
                    return;
                if (m) {
                    o.current = m.toJSON(),
                    r("subscribed");
                    try {
                        await l(m.toJSON())
                    } catch {}
                } else
                    Notification.permission === "denied" ? r("denied") : r("unsubscribed")
            } catch (f) {
                console.warn("[Push] SW registration error:", f),
                h || r("unsubscribed")
            }
        }
        )(),
        () => {
            h = !0
        }
    }
    , [e, i]);
    const l = async h => {
        const f = await fetch("/api/push/subscribe", {
            method: "POST",
            headers: {
                "Content-Type": "application/json"
            },
            body: JSON.stringify(h),
            credentials: "include"
        });
        if (!f.ok) {
            const m = await f.json().catch( () => ({}));
            throw new Error(m.message || `Server error: ${f.status}`)
        }
    }
      , c = d.useCallback(async () => {
        if (!(!s.current || !i)) {
            r("loading");
            try {
                const h = await fetch("/api/push/vapid-public-key", {
                    credentials: "include"
                })
                  , {publicKey: f} = await h.json();
                if (!f)
                    throw new Error("No VAPID public key");
                const m = await s.current.pushManager.subscribe({
                    userVisibleOnly: !0,
                    applicationServerKey: rO(f)
                });
                o.current = m.toJSON(),
                await l(m.toJSON()),
                r("subscribed"),
                t({
                    title: "Push notifications enabled",
                    description: "You'll now receive order alerts on this device even when the app is closed."
                })
            } catch (h) {
                console.error("[Push] Subscribe error:", h),
                Notification.permission === "denied" ? (r("denied"),
                t({
                    title: "Notifications blocked",
                    description: "Allow notifications in your browser settings and try again.",
                    variant: "destructive"
                })) : (r("unsubscribed"),
                t({
                    title: "Failed to enable notifications",
                    description: h.message,
                    variant: "destructive"
                }))
            }
        }
    }
    , [i, t])
      , u = d.useCallback(async () => {
        if (s.current)
            try {
                const h = await s.current.pushManager.getSubscription();
                if (h) {
                    const f = h.endpoint;
                    await h.unsubscribe(),
                    await fetch("/api/push/unsubscribe", {
                        method: "POST",
                        headers: {
                            "Content-Type": "application/json"
                        },
                        body: JSON.stringify({
                            endpoint: f
                        }),
                        credentials: "include"
                    })
                }
                o.current = null,
                r("unsubscribed"),
                t({
                    title: "Push notifications disabled"
                })
            } catch (h) {
                console.error("[Push] Unsubscribe error:", h)
            }
    }
    , [t]);
    return {
        status: n,
        subscribe: c,
        unsubscribe: u,
        isSupported: i
    }
}

function IO() {
    const [e,t] = d.useState("")
      , [n,r] = d.useState(!1)
      , {toast: s} = Bn()
      , [,o] = fr()
      , i = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search)
      , l = i.get("email") || ""
      , c = i.get("phone") || ""
      , u = i.get("channel") || "email"
      , h = u === "email" ? l : c
      , f = async m => {
        m.preventDefault(),
        r(!0);
        try {
            const x = {
                otp: e,
                channel: u
            };
            u === "email" && (x.email = l),
            u === "sms" && (x.phone = c);
            const w = await fetch("/api/auth/verify-otp", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify(x)
            });
            if (!w.ok)
                throw new Error("Invalid OTP");
            const g = await w.json();
            s({
                title: "Success",
                description: "OTP verified! Now reset your password."
            }),
            window.location.href = `/reset-password?token=${g.resetToken}`
        } catch (x) {
            s({
                title: "Error",
                description: x.message || "Invalid OTP",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            r(!1)
        }
    }
    ;
    return a.jsx("div", {
        className: "min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 via-background to-blue-500/10 p-4",
        children: a.jsxs(Je, {
            className: "w-full max-w-md",
            children: [a.jsxs(Tt, {
                className: "space-y-2",
                children: [a.jsxs(he, {
                    variant: "ghost",
                    size: "sm",
                    onClick: () => o("/forgot-password"),
                    className: "w-fit",
                    "data-testid": "button-back",
                    children: [a.jsx($u, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Back"]
                }), a.jsx(At, {
                    children: "Verify OTP"
                }), a.jsxs("p", {
                    className: "text-sm text-muted-foreground",
                    children: ["Enter the 6-digit code we sent to ", h]
                })]
            }), a.jsx(yt, {
                children: a.jsxs("form", {
                    onSubmit: f,
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: [a.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [a.jsx(nt, {
                            htmlFor: "otp",
                            children: "OTP Code"
                        }), a.jsx($e, {
                            id: "otp",
                            type: "text",
                            placeholder: "000000",
                            maxLength: 6,
                            value: e,
                            onChange: m => t(m.target.value.replace(/\D/g, "")),
                            required: !0,
                            "data-testid": "input-otp"
                        }), a.jsx("p", {
                            className: "text-xs text-muted-foreground",
                            children: "6-digit code expires in 15 minutes"
                        })]
                    }), a.jsx(he, {
                        type: "submit",
                        className: "w-full",
                        disabled: n || e.length !== 6,
                        "data-testid": "button-verify-otp",
                        children: n ? "Verifying..." : "Verify OTP"
                    })]
                })
            })]
        })
    })
}
function DO() {
    const [e,t] = d.useState("")
      , [n,r] = d.useState("")
      , [s,o] = d.useState(!1)
      , [i,l] = d.useState(!1)
      , {toast: c} = Bn()
      , [,u] = fr()
      , f = new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get("token") || ""
      , m = async x => {
        if (x.preventDefault(),
        e.length < 8) {
            c({
                title: "Error",
                description: "Password must be at least 8 characters long",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        if (e !== n) {
            c({
                title: "Error",
                description: "Passwords do not match",
                variant: "destructive"
            });
            return
        }
        l(!0);
        try {
            if (!(await fetch("/api/auth/reset-password", {
                method: "POST",
                headers: {
                    "Content-Type": "application/json"
                },
                body: JSON.stringify({
                    resetToken: f,
                    password: e
                })
            })).ok)
                throw new Error("Failed to reset password");
            c({
                title: "Success",
                description: "Password reset successfully! You can now log in."
            }),
            u("/")
        } catch (w) {
            c({
                title: "Error",
                description: w.message || "Failed to reset password",
                variant: "destructive"
            })
        } finally {
            l(!1)
        }
    }
    ;
    return a.jsx("div", {
        className: "min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 via-background to-blue-500/10 p-4",
        children: a.jsxs(Je, {
            className: "w-full max-w-md",
            children: [a.jsxs(Tt, {
                className: "space-y-2",
                children: [a.jsxs(he, {
                    variant: "ghost",
                    size: "sm",
                    onClick: () => u("/forgot-password"),
                    className: "w-fit",
                    "data-testid": "button-back",
                    children: [a.jsx($u, {
                        className: "h-4 w-4 mr-2"
                    }), "Back"]
                }), a.jsxs(At, {
                    className: "flex items-center gap-2",
                    children: [a.jsx(ME, {
                        className: "h-5 w-5"
                    }), "Create New Password"]
                })]
            }), a.jsx(yt, {
                children: a.jsxs("form", {
                    onSubmit: m,
                    className: "space-y-4",
                    children: [a.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [a.jsx(nt, {
                            htmlFor: "password",
                            children: "New Password"
                        }), a.jsxs("div", {
                            className: "relative",
                            children: [a.jsx($e, {
                                id: "password",
                                type: s ? "text" : "password",
                                placeholder: "At least 8 characters",
                                value: e,
                                onChange: x => t(x.target.value),
                                required: !0,
                                "data-testid": "input-password"
                            }), a.jsx("button", {
                                type: "button",
                                onClick: () => o(!s),
                                className: "absolute right-3 top-2.5 text-muted-foreground",
                                "data-testid": "button-toggle-password",
                                children: s ? a.jsx(Hb, {
                                    className: "h-5 w-5"
                                }) : a.jsx(Cp, {
                                    className: "h-5 w-5"
                                })
                            })]
                        })]
                    }), a.jsxs("div", {
                        className: "space-y-2",
                        children: [a.jsx(nt, {
                            htmlFor: "confirm-password",
                            children: "Confirm Password"
                        }), a.jsx($e, {
                            id: "confirm-password",
                            type: s ? "text" : "password",
                            placeholder: "Re-enter your password",
                            value: n,
                            onChange: x => r(x.target.value),
                            required: !0,
                            "data-testid": "input-confirm-password"
                        })]
                    }), a.jsx(he, {
                        type: "submit",
                        className: "w-full",
                        disabled: i || !e || !n,
                        "data-testid": "button-reset-password",
                        children: i ? "Resetting..." : "Reset Password"
                    })]
                })
            })]
        })
    })
}
var vl = e => e.type === "checkbox"
  , Vs = e => e instanceof Date
  , Ut = e => e == null;
const oN = e => typeof e == "object";
var vt = e => !Ut(e) && !Array.isArray(e) && oN(e) && !Vs(e)
  , iN = e => vt(e) && e.target ? vl(e.target) ? e.target.checked : e.target.value : e
  , FO = e => e.substring(0, e.search(/\.\d+(\.|$)/)) || e
  , lN = (e, t) => e.has(FO(t))
  , LO = e => {
    const t = e.constructor && e.constructor.prototype;
    return vt(t) && t.hasOwnProperty("isPrototypeOf")
}
  , pg = typeof window < "u" && typeof window.HTMLElement < "u" && typeof document < "u";
function lt(e) {
    let t;
    const n = Array.isArray(e)
      , r = typeof FileList < "u" ? e instanceof FileList : !1;
    if (e instanceof Date)
        t = new Date(e);
    else if (e instanceof Set)
        t = new Set(e);
    else if (!(pg && (e instanceof Blob || r)) && (n || vt(e)))
        if (t = n ? [] : {},
        !n && !LO(e))
            t = e;
        else
            for (const s in e)
                e.hasOwnProperty(s) && (t[s] = lt(e[s]));
    else
        return e;
    return t
}
var wl = e => Array.isArray(e) ? e.filter(Boolean) : []
  , rt = e => e === void 0
  , X = (e, t, n) => {
    if (!t || !vt(e))
        return n;
    const r = wl(t.split(/[,[\].]+?/)).reduce( (s, o) => Ut(s) ? s : s[o], e);
    return rt(r) || r === e ? rt(e[t]) ? n : e[t] : r
}
  , cn = e => typeof e == "boolean"
  , gg = e => /^\w*$/.test(e)
  , cN = e => wl(e.replace(/["|']|\]/g, "").split(/\.|\[/))
  , We = (e, t, n) => {
    let r = -1;
    const s = gg(t) ? [t] : cN(t)
      , o = s.length
      , i = o - 1;
    for (; ++r < o; ) {
        const l = s[r];
        let c = n;
        if (r !== i) {
            const u = e[l];
            c = vt(u) || Array.isArray(u) ? u : isNaN(+s[r + 1]) ? {} : []
        }
        if (l === "__proto__" || l === "constructor" || l === "prototype")
            return;
        e[l] = c,
        e = e[l]
    }
}
;
const nu = {
    BLUR: "blur",
    FOCUS_OUT: "focusout",
    CHANGE: "change"
}
  , bn = {
    onBlur: "onBlur",
    onChange: "onChange",
    onSubmit: "onSubmit",
    onTouched: "onTouched",
    all: "all"
}
  , pr = {
    max: "max",
    min: "min",
    maxLength: "maxLength",
    minLength: "minLength",
    pattern: "pattern",
    required: "required",
    validate: "validate"
}
  , uN = le.createContext(null)
  , bl = () => le.useContext(uN)
  , zO = e => {
    const {children: t, ...n} = e;
    return le.createElement(uN.Provider, {
        value: n
    }, t)
}
;
var dN = (e, t, n, r=!0) => {
    const s = {
        defaultValues: t._defaultValues
    };
    for (const o in e)
        Object.defineProperty(s, o, {
            get: () => {
                const i = o;
                return t._proxyFormState[i] !== bn.all && (t._proxyFormState[i] = !r || bn.all),
                n && (n[i] = !0),
                e[i]
            }
        });
    return s
}
;
function VO(e) {
    const t = bl()
      , {control: n=t.control, disabled: r, name: s, exact: o} = e || {}
      , [i,l] = le.useState(n._formState)
      , c = le.useRef({
        isDirty: !1,
        isLoading: !1,
        dirtyFields: !1,
        touchedFields: !1,
        validatingFields: !1,
        isValidating: !1,
        isValid: !1,
        errors: !1
    })
      , u = le.useRef(s);
    return u.current = s,
    le.useEffect( () => n._subscribe({
        name: u.current,
        formState: c.current,
        exact: o,
        callback: h => {
            !r && l({
                ...n._formState,
                ...h
            })
        }
    }), [n, r, o]),
    le.useEffect( () => {
        c.current.isValid && n._setValid(!0)
    }
    , [n]),
    le.useMemo( () => dN(i, n, c.current, !1), [i, n])
}
var nr = e => typeof e == "string"
  , fN = (e, t, n, r, s) => nr(e) ? (r && t.watch.add(e),
X(n, e, s)) : Array.isArray(e) ? e.map(o => (r && t.watch.add(o),
X(n, o))) : (r && (t.watchAll = !0),
n);
function $O(e) {
    const t = bl()
      , {control: n=t.control, name: r, defaultValue: s, disabled: o, exact: i} = e || {}
      , l = le.useRef(r)
      , c = le.useRef(s);
    l.current = r,
    le.useEffect( () => n._subscribe({
        name: l.current,
        formState: {
            values: !0
        },
        exact: i,
        callback: f => !o && h(fN(l.current, n._names, f.values || n._formValues, !1, c.current))
    }), [n, o, i]);
    const [u,h] = le.useState(n._getWatch(r, s));
    return le.useEffect( () => n._removeUnmounted()),
    u
}
function BO(e) {
    const t = bl()
      , {name: n, disabled: r, control: s=t.control, shouldUnregister: o} = e
      , i = lN(s._names.array, n)
      , l = $O({

const el = (e, t) => {

    switch (e.code) {
    case H.invalid_type:

        break;
    case H.invalid_literal:

    case H.unrecognized_keys:

    case H.invalid_union:
        n = "Invalid input";
        break;
    case H.invalid_union_discriminator:

        break;
    case H.invalid_enum_value:

    case H.invalid_arguments:

    case H.invalid_date:

        break;
    case H.too_small:
        e.type === "array" ? n = `Array must contain ${e.exact ? "exactly" : e.inclusive ?         break;
    case H.too_big:
        e.type === "array" ? n = `Array must contain ${e.exact ? "exactly" : e.inclusive ?     }
    time(t) {
        return typeof t == "string" ? this._addCheck({
            kind: "time",
            precision: null,
            message: t
        }) : this._addCheck({
            kind: "time",
            precision: typeof (t == null ? void 0 : t.precision) > "u" ? null : t == null ? void 0 : t.precision,
            ...xe.errToObj(t == null ? void 0 : t.message)
        })
    }
    duration(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "duration",
            ...xe.errToObj(t)
        })
    }
    regex(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "regex",
            regex: t,
            ...xe.errToObj(n)
        })
    }
    includes(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "includes",
            value: t,
            position: n == null ? void 0 : n.position,
            ...xe.errToObj(n == null ? void 0 : n.message)
        })
    }
    startsWith(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "startsWith",
            value: t,
            ...xe.errToObj(n)
        })
    }
    endsWith(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "endsWith",
            value: t,
            ...xe.errToObj(n)
        })
    }
    min(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            value: t,
            ...xe.errToObj(n)
        })
    }
    max(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            value: t,
            ...xe.errToObj(n)
        })
    }
    length(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "length",
            value: t,
            ...xe.errToObj(n)
        })
    }
    nonempty(t) {
        return this.min(1, xe.errToObj(t))
    }
    trim() {
        return new rr({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, {
                kind: "trim"
            }]
        })
    }
    toLowerCase() {
        return new rr({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, {
                kind: "toLowerCase"
            }]
        })
    }
    toUpperCase() {
        return new rr({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, {
                kind: "toUpperCase"
            }]
        })
    }
    get isDatetime() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "datetime")
    }
    get isDate() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "date")
    }
    get isTime() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "time")
    }
    get isDuration() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "duration")
    }
    get isEmail() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "email")
    }
    get isURL() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "url")
    }
    get isEmoji() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "emoji")
    }
    get isUUID() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "uuid")
    }
    get isNANOID() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "nanoid")
    }
    get isCUID() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "cuid")
    }
    get isCUID2() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "cuid2")
    }
    get isULID() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "ulid")
    }
    get isIP() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "ip")
    }
    get isCIDR() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "cidr")
    }
    get isBase64() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "base64")
    }
    get isBase64url() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "base64url")
    }
    get minLength() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "min" && (t === null || n.value > t) && (t = n.value);
        return t
    }
    get maxLength() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "max" && (t === null || n.value < t) && (t = n.value);
        return t
    }
}
rr.create = e => new rr({
    checks: [],
    typeName: Ne.ZodString,
    coerce: (e == null ? void 0 : e.coerce) ?? !1,
    ...Pe(e)
});
function C3(e, t) {
    const n = (e.toString().split(".")[1] || "").length
      , r = (t.toString().split(".")[1] || "").length
      , s = n > r ? n : r
      , o = Number.parseInt(e.toFixed(s).replace(".", ""))
      , i = Number.parseInt(t.toFixed(s).replace(".", ""));
    return o % i / 10 ** s
}
class la extends Ie {
    constructor() {
        super(...arguments),
        this.min = this.gte,
        this.max = this.lte,
        this.step = this.multipleOf
    }
    _parse(t) {
        if (this._def.coerce && (t.data = Number(t.data)),
        this._getType(t) !== ce.number) {
            const o = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return ne(o, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.number,
                received: o.parsedType
            }),
            ke
        }
        let r;
        const s = new Qt;
        for (const o of this._def.checks)
            o.kind === "int" ? Be.isInteger(t.data) || (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: "integer",
                received: "float",
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : o.kind === "min" ? (o.inclusive ? t.data < o.value : t.data <= o.value) && (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.too_small,
                minimum: o.value,
                type: "number",
                inclusive: o.inclusive,
                exact: !1,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : o.kind === "max" ? (o.inclusive ? t.data > o.value : t.data >= o.value) && (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.too_big,
                maximum: o.value,
                type: "number",
                inclusive: o.inclusive,
                exact: !1,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : o.kind === "multipleOf" ? C3(t.data, o.value) !== 0 && (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.not_multiple_of,
                multipleOf: o.value,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : o.kind === "finite" ? Number.isFinite(t.data) || (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.not_finite,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : Be.assertNever(o);
        return {
            status: s.value,
            value: t.data
        }
    }
    gte(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("min", t, !0, xe.toString(n))
    }
    gt(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("min", t, !1, xe.toString(n))
    }
    lte(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("max", t, !0, xe.toString(n))
    }
    lt(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("max", t, !1, xe.toString(n))
    }
    setLimit(t, n, r, s) {
        return new la({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, {
                kind: t,
                value: n,
                inclusive: r,
                message: xe.toString(s)
            }]
        })
    }
    _addCheck(t) {
        return new la({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, t]
        })
    }
    int(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "int",
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    positive(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            value: 0,
            inclusive: !1,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    negative(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            value: 0,
            inclusive: !1,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    nonpositive(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            value: 0,
            inclusive: !0,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    nonnegative(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            value: 0,
            inclusive: !0,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    multipleOf(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "multipleOf",
            value: t,
            message: xe.toString(n)
        })
    }
    finite(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "finite",
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    safe(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            inclusive: !0,
            value: Number.MIN_SAFE_INTEGER,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            inclusive: !0,
            value: Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    get minValue() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "min" && (t === null || n.value > t) && (t = n.value);
        return t
    }
    get maxValue() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "max" && (t === null || n.value < t) && (t = n.value);
        return t
    }
    get isInt() {
        return !!this._def.checks.find(t => t.kind === "int" || t.kind === "multipleOf" && Be.isInteger(t.value))
    }
    get isFinite() {
        let t = null
          , n = null;
        for (const r of this._def.checks) {
            if (r.kind === "finite" || r.kind === "int" || r.kind === "multipleOf")
                return !0;
            r.kind === "min" ? (n === null || r.value > n) && (n = r.value) : r.kind === "max" && (t === null || r.value < t) && (t = r.value)
        }
        return Number.isFinite(n) && Number.isFinite(t)
    }
}
la.create = e => new la({
    checks: [],
    typeName: Ne.ZodNumber,
    coerce: (e == null ? void 0 : e.coerce) || !1,
    ...Pe(e)
});
class ca extends Ie {
    constructor() {
        super(...arguments),
        this.min = this.gte,
        this.max = this.lte
    }
    _parse(t) {
        if (this._def.coerce)
            try {
                t.data = BigInt(t.data)
            } catch {
                return this._getInvalidInput(t)
            }
        if (this._getType(t) !== ce.bigint)
            return this._getInvalidInput(t);
        let r;
        const s = new Qt;
        for (const o of this._def.checks)
            o.kind === "min" ? (o.inclusive ? t.data < o.value : t.data <= o.value) && (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.too_small,
                type: "bigint",
                minimum: o.value,
                inclusive: o.inclusive,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : o.kind === "max" ? (o.inclusive ? t.data > o.value : t.data >= o.value) && (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.too_big,
                type: "bigint",
                maximum: o.value,
                inclusive: o.inclusive,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : o.kind === "multipleOf" ? t.data % o.value !== BigInt(0) && (r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, r),
            ne(r, {
                code: H.not_multiple_of,
                multipleOf: o.value,
                message: o.message
            }),
            s.dirty()) : Be.assertNever(o);
        return {
            status: s.value,
            value: t.data
        }
    }
    _getInvalidInput(t) {
        const n = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
        return ne(n, {
            code: H.invalid_type,
            expected: ce.bigint,
            received: n.parsedType
        }),
        ke
    }
    gte(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("min", t, !0, xe.toString(n))
    }
    gt(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("min", t, !1, xe.toString(n))
    }
    lte(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("max", t, !0, xe.toString(n))
    }
    lt(t, n) {
        return this.setLimit("max", t, !1, xe.toString(n))
    }
    setLimit(t, n, r, s) {
        return new ca({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, {
                kind: t,
                value: n,
                inclusive: r,
                message: xe.toString(s)
            }]
        })
    }
    _addCheck(t) {
        return new ca({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, t]
        })
    }
    positive(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            value: BigInt(0),
            inclusive: !1,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    negative(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            value: BigInt(0),
            inclusive: !1,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    nonpositive(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            value: BigInt(0),
            inclusive: !0,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    nonnegative(t) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            value: BigInt(0),
            inclusive: !0,
            message: xe.toString(t)
        })
    }
    multipleOf(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "multipleOf",
            value: t,
            message: xe.toString(n)
        })
    }
    get minValue() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "min" && (t === null || n.value > t) && (t = n.value);
        return t
    }
    get maxValue() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "max" && (t === null || n.value < t) && (t = n.value);
        return t
    }
}
ca.create = e => new ca({
    checks: [],
    typeName: Ne.ZodBigInt,
    coerce: (e == null ? void 0 : e.coerce) ?? !1,
    ...Pe(e)
});
class iu extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        if (this._def.coerce && (t.data = !!t.data),
        this._getType(t) !== ce.boolean) {
            const r = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.boolean,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            ke
        }
        return sn(t.data)
    }
}

class Oo extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        if (this._def.coerce && (t.data = new Date(t.data)),
        this._getType(t) !== ce.date) {
            const o = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return ne(o, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.date,
                received: o.parsedType
            }),
            ke
        }
        if (Number.isNaN(t.data.getTime())) {
            const o = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return ne(o, {
                code: H.invalid_date
            }),
            ke
        }
        const r = new Qt;
        let s;
        for (const o of this._def.checks)
            o.kind === "min" ? t.data.getTime() < o.value && (s = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, s),
            ne(s, {
                code: H.too_small,
                message: o.message,
                inclusive: !0,
                exact: !1,
                minimum: o.value,
                type: "date"
            }),
            r.dirty()) : o.kind === "max" ? t.data.getTime() > o.value && (s = this._getOrReturnCtx(t, s),
            ne(s, {
                code: H.too_big,
                message: o.message,
                inclusive: !0,
                exact: !1,
                maximum: o.value,
                type: "date"
            }),
            r.dirty()) : Be.assertNever(o);
        return {
            status: r.value,
            value: new Date(t.data.getTime())
        }
    }
    _addCheck(t) {
        return new Oo({
            ...this._def,
            checks: [...this._def.checks, t]
        })
    }
    min(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "min",
            value: t.getTime(),
            message: xe.toString(n)
        })
    }
    max(t, n) {
        return this._addCheck({
            kind: "max",
            value: t.getTime(),
            message: xe.toString(n)
        })
    }
    get minDate() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "min" && (t === null || n.value > t) && (t = n.value);
        return t != null ? new Date(t) : null
    }
    get maxDate() {
        let t = null;
        for (const n of this._def.checks)
            n.kind === "max" && (t === null || n.value < t) && (t = n.value);
        return t != null ? new Date(t) : null
    }
}

    coerce: (e == null ? void 0 : e.coerce) || !1,

class lr extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        const {ctx: n, status: r} = this._processInputParams(t)
          , s = this._def;
        if (n.parsedType !== ce.array)
            return ne(n, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.array,
                received: n.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        if (s.exactLength !== null) {
            const i = n.data.length > s.exactLength.value
              , l = n.data.length < s.exactLength.value;
            (i || l) && (ne(n, {
                code: i ? H.too_big : H.too_small,
                minimum: l ? s.exactLength.value : void 0,
                maximum: i ? s.exactLength.value : void 0,
                type: "array",
                inclusive: !0,
                exact: !0,
                message: s.exactLength.message
            }),
            r.dirty())
        }
        if (s.minLength !== null && n.data.length < s.minLength.value && (ne(n, {
            code: H.too_small,
            minimum: s.minLength.value,
            type: "array",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: s.minLength.message
        }),
        r.dirty()),
        s.maxLength !== null && n.data.length > s.maxLength.value && (ne(n, {
            code: H.too_big,
            maximum: s.maxLength.value,
            type: "array",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: s.maxLength.message
        }),
        r.dirty()),
        n.common.async)
            return Promise.all([...n.data].map( (i, l) => s.type._parseAsync(new dr(n,i,n.path,l)))).then(i => Qt.mergeArray(r, i));
        const o = [...n.data].map( (i, l) => s.type._parseSync(new dr(n,i,n.path,l)));
        return Qt.mergeArray(r, o)
    }
    get element() {
        return this._def.type
    }
    min(t, n) {
        return new lr({
            ...this._def,
            minLength: {
                value: t,
                message: xe.toString(n)
            }
        })
    }
    max(t, n) {
        return new lr({
            ...this._def,
            maxLength: {
                value: t,
                message: xe.toString(n)
            }
        })
    }
    length(t, n) {
        return new lr({
            ...this._def,
            exactLength: {
                value: t,
                message: xe.toString(n)
            }
        })
    }
    nonempty(t) {
        return this.min(1, t)
    }
}
lr.create = (e, t) => new lr({
    type: e,
    minLength: null,
    maxLength: null,
    exactLength: null,
    typeName: Ne.ZodArray,
    ...Pe(t)
});
function Sa(e) {
    if (e instanceof mt) {
        const t = {};
        for (const n in e.shape) {
            const r = e.shape[n];
            t[n] = _r.create(Sa(r))
        }
        return new mt({
            ...e._def,
            shape: () => t
        })
    } else
        return e instanceof lr ? new lr({
            ...e._def,
            type: Sa(e.element)
        }) : e instanceof _r ? _r.create(Sa(e.unwrap())) : e instanceof da ? da.create(Sa(e.unwrap())) : e instanceof Ir ? Ir.create(e.items.map(t => Sa(t))) : e
}
class mt extends Ie {
    constructor() {
        super(...arguments),
        this._cached = null,
        this.nonstrict = this.passthrough,
        this.augment = this.extend
    }
    _getCached() {
        if (this._cached !== null)
            return this._cached;
        const t = this._def.shape()
          , n = Be.objectKeys(t);
        return this._cached = {
            shape: t,
            keys: n
        },
        this._cached
    }
    _parse(t) {
        if (this._getType(t) !== ce.object) {
            const u = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return ne(u, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.object,
                received: u.parsedType
            }),
            ke
        }
        const {status: r, ctx: s} = this._processInputParams(t)
          , {shape: o, keys: i} = this._getCached()
          , l = [];
        if (!(this._def.catchall instanceof Ss && this._def.unknownKeys === "strip"))
            for (const u in s.data)
                i.includes(u) || l.push(u);
        const c = [];
        for (const u of i) {
            const h = o[u]
              , f = s.data[u];
            c.push({
                key: {
                    status: "valid",
                    value: u
                },
                value: h._parse(new dr(s,f,s.path,u)),
                alwaysSet: u in s.data
            })
        }
        if (this._def.catchall instanceof Ss) {
            const u = this._def.unknownKeys;
            if (u === "passthrough")
                for (const h of l)
                    c.push({
                        key: {
                            status: "valid",
                            value: h
                        },
                        value: {
                            status: "valid",
                            value: s.data[h]
                        }
                    });
            else if (u === "strict")
                l.length > 0 && (ne(s, {
                    code: H.unrecognized_keys,
                    keys: l
                }),
                r.dirty());
            else if (u !== "strip")
                throw new Error("Internal ZodObject error: invalid unknownKeys value.")
        } else {
            const u = this._def.catchall;
            for (const h of l) {
                const f = s.data[h];
                c.push({
                    key: {
                        status: "valid",
                        value: h
                    },
                    value: u._parse(new dr(s,f,s.path,h)),
                    alwaysSet: h in s.data
                })
            }
        }
        return s.common.async ? Promise.resolve().then(async () => {
            const u = [];
            for (const h of c) {
                const f = await h.key
                  , m = await h.value;
                u.push({
                    key: f,
                    value: m,
                    alwaysSet: h.alwaysSet
                })
            }
            return u
        }
        ).then(u => Qt.mergeObjectSync(r, u)) : Qt.mergeObjectSync(r, c)
    }
    get shape() {
        return this._def.shape()
    }
    strict(t) {
        return xe.errToObj,
        new mt({
            ...this._def,
            unknownKeys: "strict",
            ...t !== void 0 ? {
                errorMap: (n, r) => {
                    var o, i;
                    const s = ((i = (o = this._def).errorMap) == null ? void 0 : i.call(o, n, r).message) ?? r.defaultError;
                    return n.code === "unrecognized_keys" ? {
                        message: xe.errToObj(t).message ?? s
                    } : {
                        message: s
                    }
                }
            } : {}
        })
    }
    strip() {
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            unknownKeys: "strip"
        })
    }
    passthrough() {
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            unknownKeys: "passthrough"
        })
    }
    extend(t) {
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => ({
                ...this._def.shape(),
                ...t
            })
        })
    }
    merge(t) {
        return new mt({
            unknownKeys: t._def.unknownKeys,
            catchall: t._def.catchall,
            shape: () => ({
                ...this._def.shape(),
                ...t._def.shape()
            }),
            typeName: Ne.ZodObject
        })
    }
    setKey(t, n) {
        return this.augment({
            [t]: n
        })
    }
    catchall(t) {
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            catchall: t
        })
    }
    pick(t) {
        const n = {};
        for (const r of Be.objectKeys(t))
            t[r] && this.shape[r] && (n[r] = this.shape[r]);
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => n
        })
    }
    omit(t) {
        const n = {};
        for (const r of Be.objectKeys(this.shape))
            t[r] || (n[r] = this.shape[r]);
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => n
        })
    }
    deepPartial() {
        return Sa(this)
    }
    partial(t) {
        const n = {};
        for (const r of Be.objectKeys(this.shape)) {
            const s = this.shape[r];
            t && !t[r] ? n[r] = s : n[r] = s.optional()
        }
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => n
        })
    }
    required(t) {
        const n = {};
        for (const r of Be.objectKeys(this.shape))
            if (t && !t[r])
                n[r] = this.shape[r];
            else {
                let o = this.shape[r];
                for (; o instanceof _r; )
                    o = o._def.innerType;
                n[r] = o
            }
        return new mt({
            ...this._def,
            shape: () => n
        })
    }
    keyof() {
        return SN(Be.objectKeys(this.shape))
    }
}
mt.create = (e, t) => new mt({
    shape: () => e,
    unknownKeys: "strip",
    catchall: Ss.create(),
    typeName: Ne.ZodObject,
    ...Pe(t)
});
mt.strictCreate = (e, t) => new mt({
    shape: () => e,
    unknownKeys: "strict",
    catchall: Ss.create(),
    typeName: Ne.ZodObject,
    ...Pe(t)
});
mt.lazycreate = (e, t) => new mt({
    shape: e,
    unknownKeys: "strip",
    catchall: Ss.create(),
    typeName: Ne.ZodObject,
    ...Pe(t)
});
class uu extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        const {ctx: n} = this._processInputParams(t)
          , r = this._def.options;
        function s(o) {
            for (const l of o)
                if (l.result.status === "valid")
                    return l.result;
            for (const l of o)
                if (l.result.status === "dirty")
                    return n.common.issues.push(...l.ctx.common.issues),
                    l.result;
            const i = o.map(l => new _n(l.ctx.common.issues));
            return ne(n, {
                code: H.invalid_union,
                unionErrors: i
            }),
            ke
        }
        if (n.common.async)
            return Promise.all(r.map(async o => {
                const i = {
                    ...n,
                    common: {
                        ...n.common,
                        issues: []
                    },
                    parent: null
                };
                return {
                    result: await o._parseAsync({
                        data: n.data,
                        path: n.path,
                        parent: i
                    }),
                    ctx: i
                }
            }
            )).then(s);
        {
            let o;
            const i = [];
            for (const c of r) {
                const u = {
                    ...n,
                    common: {
                        ...n.common,
                        issues: []
                    },
                    parent: null
                }
                  , h = c._parseSync({
                    data: n.data,
                    path: n.path,
                    parent: u
                });
                if (h.status === "valid")
                    return h;
                h.status === "dirty" && !o && (o = {
                    result: h,
                    ctx: u
                }),
                u.common.issues.length && i.push(u.common.issues)
            }
            if (o)
                return n.common.issues.push(...o.ctx.common.issues),
                o.result;
            const l = i.map(c => new _n(c));
            return ne(n, {
                code: H.invalid_union,
                unionErrors: l
            }),
            ke
        }
    }
    get options() {
        return this._def.options
    }
}
uu.create = (e, t) => new uu({
    options: e,
    typeName: Ne.ZodUnion,
    ...Pe(t)
});
const xr = e => e instanceof hu ? xr(e.schema) : e instanceof Dr ? xr(e.innerType()) : e instanceof mu ? [e.value] : e instanceof ua ? e.options : e instanceof pu ? Be.objectValues(e.enum) : e instanceof gu ? xr(e._def.innerType) : e instanceof lu ? [void 0] : e instanceof cu ? [null] : e instanceof _r ? [void 0, ...xr(e.unwrap())] : e instanceof da ? [null, ...xr(e.unwrap())] : e instanceof _N || e instanceof yu ? xr(e.unwrap()) : e instanceof xu ? xr(e._def.innerType) : [];
class vg extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        const {ctx: n} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (n.parsedType !== ce.object)
            return ne(n, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.object,
                received: n.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        const r = this.discriminator
          , s = n.data[r]
          , o = this.optionsMap.get(s);
        return o ? n.common.async ? o._parseAsync({
            data: n.data,
            path: n.path,
            parent: n
        }) : o._parseSync({
            data: n.data,
            path: n.path,
            parent: n
        }) : (ne(n, {
            code: H.invalid_union_discriminator,
            options: Array.from(this.optionsMap.keys()),
            path: [r]
        }),
        ke)
    }
    get discriminator() {
        return this._def.discriminator
    }
    get options() {
        return this._def.options
    }
    get optionsMap() {
        return this._def.optionsMap
    }
    static create(t, n, r) {
        const s = new Map;
        for (const o of n) {
            const i = xr(o.shape[t]);
            if (!i.length)
                throw new Error(`A discriminator value for key \`${t}\` could not be extracted from all schema options`);
            for (const l of i) {
                if (s.has(l))
                    throw new Error(`Discriminator property ${String(t)} has duplicate value ${String(l)}`);
                s.set(l, o)
            }
        }
        return new vg({
            typeName: Ne.ZodDiscriminatedUnion,
            discriminator: t,
            options: n,
            optionsMap: s,
            ...Pe(r)
        })
    }
}
function hm(e, t) {
    const n = Gr(e)
      , r = Gr(t);
    if (e === t)
        return {
            valid: !0,
            data: e
        };
    if (n === ce.object && r === ce.object) {
        const s = Be.objectKeys(t)
          , o = Be.objectKeys(e).filter(l => s.indexOf(l) !== -1)
          , i = {
            ...e,
            ...t
        };
        for (const l of o) {
            const c = hm(e[l], t[l]);
            if (!c.valid)
                return {
                    valid: !1
                };
            i[l] = c.data
        }
        return {
            valid: !0,
            data: i
        }
    } else if (n === ce.array && r === ce.array) {
        if (e.length !== t.length)
            return {
                valid: !1
            };
        const s = [];
        for (let o = 0; o < e.length; o++) {
            const i = e[o]
              , l = t[o]
              , c = hm(i, l);
            if (!c.valid)
                return {
                    valid: !1
                };
            s.push(c.data)
        }
        return {
            valid: !0,
            data: s
        }
    } else
        return n === ce.date && r === ce.date && +e == +t ? {
            valid: !0,
            data: e
        } : {
            valid: !1
        }
}
class du extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        const {status: n, ctx: r} = this._processInputParams(t)
          , s = (o, i) => {
            if (Y0(o) || Y0(i))
                return ke;
            const l = hm(o.value, i.value);
            return l.valid ? ((Z0(o) || Z0(i)) && n.dirty(),
            {
                status: n.value,
                value: l.data
            }) : (ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_intersection_types
            }),
            ke)
        }
        ;
        return r.common.async ? Promise.all([this._def.left._parseAsync({
            data: r.data,
            path: r.path,
            parent: r
        }), this._def.right._parseAsync({
            data: r.data,
            path: r.path,
            parent: r
        })]).then( ([o,i]) => s(o, i)) : s(this._def.left._parseSync({
            data: r.data,
            path: r.path,
            parent: r
        }), this._def.right._parseSync({
            data: r.data,
            path: r.path,
            parent: r
        }))
    }
}
du.create = (e, t, n) => new du({
    left: e,
    right: t,
    typeName: Ne.ZodIntersection,
    ...Pe(n)
});
class Ir extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        const {status: n, ctx: r} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (r.parsedType !== ce.array)
            return ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.array,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        if (r.data.length < this._def.items.length)
            return ne(r, {
                code: H.too_small,
                minimum: this._def.items.length,
                inclusive: !0,
                exact: !1,
                type: "array"
            }),
            ke;
        !this._def.rest && r.data.length > this._def.items.length && (ne(r, {
            code: H.too_big,
            maximum: this._def.items.length,
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            type: "array"
        }),
        n.dirty());
        const o = [...r.data].map( (i, l) => {
            const c = this._def.items[l] || this._def.rest;
            return c ? c._parse(new dr(r,i,r.path,l)) : null
        }
        ).filter(i => !!i);
        return r.common.async ? Promise.all(o).then(i => Qt.mergeArray(n, i)) : Qt.mergeArray(n, o)
    }
    get items() {
        return this._def.items
    }
    rest(t) {
        return new Ir({
            ...this._def,
            rest: t
        })
    }
}
Ir.create = (e, t) => {
    if (!Array.isArray(e))
        throw new Error("You must pass an array of schemas to z.tuple([ ... ])");
    return new Ir({
        items: e,
        typeName: Ne.ZodTuple,
        rest: null,
        ...Pe(t)
    })
}
;
class fu extends Ie {
    get keySchema() {
        return this._def.keyType
    }
    get valueSchema() {
        return this._def.valueType
    }
    _parse(t) {
        const {status: n, ctx: r} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (r.parsedType !== ce.object)
            return ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.object,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        const s = []
          , o = this._def.keyType
          , i = this._def.valueType;
        for (const l in r.data)
            s.push({
                key: o._parse(new dr(r,l,r.path,l)),
                value: i._parse(new dr(r,r.data[l],r.path,l)),
                alwaysSet: l in r.data
            });
        return r.common.async ? Qt.mergeObjectAsync(n, s) : Qt.mergeObjectSync(n, s)
    }
    get element() {
        return this._def.valueType
    }
    static create(t, n, r) {
        return n instanceof Ie ? new fu({
            keyType: t,
            valueType: n,
            typeName: Ne.ZodRecord,
            ...Pe(r)
        }) : new fu({
            keyType: rr.create(),
            valueType: t,
            typeName: Ne.ZodRecord,
            ...Pe(n)
        })
    }
}
class mm extends Ie {
    get keySchema() {
        return this._def.keyType
    }
    get valueSchema() {
        return this._def.valueType
    }
    _parse(t) {
        const {status: n, ctx: r} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (r.parsedType !== ce.map)
            return ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.map,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        const s = this._def.keyType
          , o = this._def.valueType
          , i = [...r.data.entries()].map( ([l,c], u) => ({
            key: s._parse(new dr(r,l,r.path,[u, "key"])),
            value: o._parse(new dr(r,c,r.path,[u, "value"]))
        }));
        if (r.common.async) {
            const l = new Map;
            return Promise.resolve().then(async () => {
                for (const c of i) {
                    const u = await c.key
                      , h = await c.value;
                    if (u.status === "aborted" || h.status === "aborted")
                        return ke;
                    (u.status === "dirty" || h.status === "dirty") && n.dirty(),
                    l.set(u.value, h.value)
                }
                return {
                    status: n.value,
                    value: l
                }
            }
            )
        } else {
            const l = new Map;
            for (const c of i) {
                const u = c.key
                  , h = c.value;
                if (u.status === "aborted" || h.status === "aborted")
                    return ke;
                (u.status === "dirty" || h.status === "dirty") && n.dirty(),
                l.set(u.value, h.value)
            }
            return {
                status: n.value,
                value: l
            }
        }
    }
}
mm.create = (e, t, n) => new mm({
    valueType: t,
    keyType: e,
    typeName: Ne.ZodMap,
    ...Pe(n)
});
class Mo extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        const {status: n, ctx: r} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (r.parsedType !== ce.set)
            return ne(r, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.set,
                received: r.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        const s = this._def;
        s.minSize !== null && r.data.size < s.minSize.value && (ne(r, {
            code: H.too_small,
            minimum: s.minSize.value,
            type: "set",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: s.minSize.message
        }),
        n.dirty()),
        s.maxSize !== null && r.data.size > s.maxSize.value && (ne(r, {
            code: H.too_big,
            maximum: s.maxSize.value,
            type: "set",
            inclusive: !0,
            exact: !1,
            message: s.maxSize.message
        }),
        n.dirty());
        const o = this._def.valueType;
        function i(c) {
            const u = new Set;
            for (const h of c) {
                if (h.status === "aborted")
                    return ke;
                h.status === "dirty" && n.dirty(),
                u.add(h.value)
            }
            return {
                status: n.value,
                value: u
            }
        }
        const l = [...r.data.values()].map( (c, u) => o._parse(new dr(r,c,r.path,u)));
        return r.common.async ? Promise.all(l).then(c => i(c)) : i(l)
    }
    min(t, n) {
        return new Mo({
            ...this._def,
            minSize: {
                value: t,
                message: xe.toString(n)
            }
        })
    }
    max(t, n) {
        return new Mo({
            ...this._def,
            maxSize: {
                value: t,
                message: xe.toString(n)
            }
        })
    }
    size(t, n) {
        return this.min(t, n).max(t, n)
    }
    nonempty(t) {
        return this.min(1, t)
    }
}
Mo.create = (e, t) => new Mo({
    valueType: e,
    minSize: null,
    maxSize: null,
    typeName: Ne.ZodSet,
    ...Pe(t)
});
class Ei extends Ie {
    constructor() {
        super(...arguments),
        this.validate = this.implement
    }
    _parse(t) {
        const {ctx: n} = this._processInputParams(t);
        if (n.parsedType !== ce.function)
            return ne(n, {
                code: H.invalid_type,
                expected: ce.function,
                received: n.parsedType
            }),
            ke;
        function r(l, c) {
            return um({
                data: l,
                path: n.path,
                errorMaps: [n.common.contextualErrorMap, n.schemaErrorMap, cm(), el].filter(u => !!u),
                issueData: {
                    code: H.invalid_arguments,
                    argumentsError: c
                }
            })
        }
        function s(l, c) {
            return um({
                data: l,
                path: n.path,
                errorMaps: [n.common.contextualErrorMap, n.schemaErrorMap, cm(), el].filter(u => !!u),
                issueData: {
                    code: H.invalid_return_type,
                    returnTypeError: c
                }
            })
        }
        const o = {
            errorMap: n.common.contextualErrorMap
        }
          , i = n.data;
        if (this._def.returns instanceof nl) {
            const l = this;
            return sn(async function(...c) {
                const u = new _n([])
                  , h = await l._def.args.parseAsync(c, o).catch(x => {
                    throw u.addIssue(r(c, x)),
                    u
                }
                )
                  , f = await Reflect.apply(i, this, h);
                return await l._def.returns._def.type.parseAsync(f, o).catch(x => {
                    throw u.addIssue(s(f, x)),
                    u
                }
                )
            })
        } else {
            const l = this;
            return sn(function(...c) {
                const u = l._def.args.safeParse(c, o);
                if (!u.success)
                    throw new _n([r(c, u.error)]);
                const h = Reflect.apply(i, this, u.data)
                  , f = l._def.returns.safeParse(h, o);
                if (!f.success)
                    throw new _n([s(h, f.error)]);
                return f.data
            })
        }
    }
    parameters() {
        return this._def.args
    }
    returnType() {
        return this._def.returns
    }
    args(...t) {
        return new Ei({
            ...this._def,
            args: Ir.create(t).rest(eo.create())
        })
    }
    returns(t) {
        return new Ei({
            ...this._def,
            returns: t
        })
    }
    implement(t) {
        return this.parse(t)
    }
    strictImplement(t) {
        return this.parse(t)
    }
    static create(t, n, r) {
        return new Ei({
            args: t || Ir.create([]).rest(eo.create()),
            returns: n || eo.create(),
            typeName: Ne.ZodFunction,
            ...Pe(r)
        })
    }
}
class hu extends Ie {
    get schema() {
        return this._def.getter()
    }
    _parse(t) {
        const {ctx: n} = this._processInputParams(t);
        return this._def.getter()._parse({
            data: n.data,
            path: n.path,
            parent: n
        })
    }
}

    getter: e,
    typeName: Ne.ZodLazy,
    ...Pe(t)
});
class mu extends Ie {
    _parse(t) {
        if (t.data !== this._def.value) {
            const n = this._getOrReturnCtx(t);
            return ne(n, {
                received: n.data,
                code: H.invalid_literal,
                expected: this._def.value
            }),
            ke
        }
        return {
            status: "valid",
            value: t.data
        }
    }
    get value() {
        return this._def.value
    }
}
